quick_pass.note: Status implemented with 4 verification-evidence entries (VE-1..VE-4) citing explicit pass counts (frontend 44/44, server 25/25) covering AC-1..AC-5. All 5 trace paths exist, no mismatches. No outgoing dependency edges (it is a base validation requirement other REQs extend/depend on), so no dependency-health exposure. Stability is evolving (not yet stable) by design, pending live non-2002/soak validation per its own change notes — an intentional, already-documented gate, not an open issue. Minor cosmetic note: AC checkboxes in the markdown body all render unchecked despite implemented status and cited evidence; worth a checkbox-state sync pass, but this does not affect feasibility.
